references.name: documentation-web-viewer-system
references.description: Static JS documentation viewer (docs/index.html) with: markdown parsing, Mermaid rendering, 4-theme system, bilingual FR/EN, portrait/landscape toggle, doc-header convention (nav-back, actual page link, version tag, collapsible metadata), unified chrome bar for embeds, TOC generation (two-column 8+), corporate PDF export (cover centered, TOC page 2, running header/footer, blue liners), corporate DOCX export (same styling via MSO elements), internal link interceptor with viewer URL rewriting, Liquid tag resolver, soft-coupled baseurl auto-detection. Main navigator interface with draggable panel dividers (drag + click-to-step), publication card links via viewerRewriteUrl.

references.name: webcards
references.description: Webcard system in viewer: og:image meta tag injection, webcard header display with <picture> + prefers-color-scheme, theme-aware cayman/midnight variants, assets/og/ directory for animated GIFs (1200x630).

references.name: live-mindmap
references.description: Live mindmap: standalone interface page at /interfaces/live-mindmap/ and embedded at top of knowledge 2.0 full publication. Fetches mind_memory.md, renders mermaid mindmap in real-time. Fullscreen support.

references.name: K_DOCS-module-sync
references.description: Ensure K_DOCS implementation stays in Knowledge/K_DOCS. When K_MIND fixes are made during integration in K_DOCS repo, push changes back to packetqc/K_MIND via k_mind remote. Module sync script to diff and push integration fixes upstream.
